allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "f:\\contaudi\\PycharmProjects\\FS\\focustrack-electron" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "Processos node encerrados")

PowerShell($debug = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/narrative?start=2026-05-04&debug=1" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "=== SINAIS MANUAIS ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.sinais_manuais | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($debug = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/narrative?start=2026-05-04&debug=1"; Write-Output "=== BACKLOG EXECUTIVO ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.backlog_executivo | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($debug = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/narrative?start=2026-05-04&debug=1"; Write-Output "=== CARTEIRA EXECUTIVA ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.carteira_executiva | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; Write-Output "=== TEMAS DA SEMANA ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.temas_da_semana | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($debug = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/narrative?start=2026-05-04&debug=1"; Write-Output "=== COMENTARIOS EXECUTIVOS \(primeiros 3\) ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.comentarios_executivos | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; Write-Output "=== TOTAL COMENTARIOS ==="; $debug.dados_base.resumo_para_ia.comentarios_executivos.Count)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/email-html?start=2026-05-04" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "ok: $\($r.ok\)"; Write-Output "html length: $\($r.html.Length\)"; $r.html | Out-File "f:\\contaudi\\PycharmProjects\\FS\\focustrack-electron\\test-email.html" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Arquivo salvo em test-email.html")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/report/week/email-html?start=2026-05-04&debug=1" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "=== DEBUG narrativa \(keys\) ==="; $r.dados_base.narrativa.PSObject.Properties.Name; Write-Output "=== vitorias_da_semana ==="; $r.dados_base.narrativa.vitorias_da_semana | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)
